metadata.description: AWS resiliency plugin — reviews CDK, CloudFormation, Terraform, and SAM code for failure modes, single points of failure, RTO/RPO gaps, and Well-Architected Reliability pillar findings.

plugins.name: aws-resiliency
plugins.description: AWS resiliency expert that reviews IaC (CDK, CloudFormation, Terraform, SAM) for failure modes, single points of failure, RTO/RPO gaps, and Well-Architected Reliability findings across Compute, Data, Networking, Storage, Messaging, Observability, and Multi-Region DR.
